<think> Mehdi Mahdavikia was born on January 2, 1976, and Ali Daei was born on March 14, 1975. To find out which one is older, we need to compare their birth years. Since Ali Daei was born earlier in the year, but Mehdi Mahdavikia was born earlier in the calendar year, we still need to compare their birth years numerically. In this case, Ali Daei was born in 1975, and Mehdi Mahdavikia was born in 1976. Therefore, Ali Daei is the older football player. </think>

<answer> \boxed{Ali Daei} </answer>
